title: lespedeza × cyrtoloba
intro: Lespedeza × cyrtoloba, also known as Japanese clover or Lespedeza, is a perennial legume that is commonly found in East Asia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving digestion, as well as having anti-cancer and anti-aging properties. Lespedeza × cyrtoloba can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, infusion, and tincture, which are often used to treat various health conditions.
